rankings.title: West Asia war: RBI warns of upside risks to current account deficit in FY27; rupee faces continued headwinds
rankings.india_relevance: RBI's official assessment of war impact on India's external account and currency.
rankings.why_it_matters: Direct policy warning from the central bank on macroeconomic stability; guides investment and forex outlook.

rankings.title: RBI proposes principles-based framework for bank boards, prioritizing strategy, risk oversight
rankings.india_relevance: Central bank proposes overhaul of bank governance, moving from rule-based to principles-based oversight.
rankings.why_it_matters: Signals a fundamental shift in banking regulation, focusing on board accountability and strategic risk.

rankings.title: How West Asia conflict impacted Indian airlines' international business
rankings.india_relevance: Explains the mechanism of war impact on Indian aviation's key revenue segment.
rankings.why_it_matters: Details operational and financial damage beyond headline fuel costs, revealing sector vulnerabilities.

rankings.title: How Iran plans to tax oil tankers passing through Strait of Hormuz
rankings.india_relevance: Iran's mechanism for taxing a critical oil shipping chokepoint directly impacts India's energy imports.
rankings.why_it_matters: Reveals a new, persistent cost layer and potential payment complexity (crypto) for India's crude supplies.

rankings.title: An Iranian union official says Iran will demand that shipping companies pay tolls in crypto for oil tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz (Financial Times)
rankings.india_relevance: Original detail on a novel crypto-based transit tax mechanism affecting all Indian oil imports via Hormuz.
rankings.why_it_matters: Introduces a complex financial and compliance layer for refiners, a direct operational impact.

rankings.title: India cuts airport charges by 25% to ease airline cost pressures
rankings.india_relevance: Policy intervention to structurally lower operational costs for India's aviation sector.
rankings.why_it_matters: Direct fiscal relief with quantified savings; aims to stabilize fares and airline viability post-crisis.

rankings.title: Shipping far from normalcy after Hormuz truce
rankings.india_relevance: Analysis explaining why supply chain normalization for India will lag the geopolitical ceasefire.
rankings.why_it_matters: Sets realistic expectations for importers; highlights lingering insurance, routing, and cost issues.

rankings.title: World Bank raises India growth forecast by 30 bps to 6.6% for FY27 - The Financial Express
rankings.india_relevance: Multilateral institution's revised official assessment of India's growth trajectory.
rankings.why_it_matters: Authoritative global benchmark influencing investor sentiment and policy dialogue.

rankings.india_relevance: Major input cost increase for India's construction, auto, and capital goods sectors.
rankings.why_it_matters: Signals rising inflation pressure downstream, impacting project costs and corporate margins.

rankings.title: India steps up efforts to bring back stranded vessels after Gulf ceasefire - The Financial Express
rankings.india_relevance: Government action to resolve a direct supply-chain blockage affecting Indian cargo and shipments.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights post-crisis logistical coordination and the tangible steps to restore trade flows.
